name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new Source2Study feature
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement

---

## Problem

What user problem should this solve?

## Proposed behavior

Describe the smallest useful version of the feature.

## User workflow

What commands or screens would the user touch?

## Safety and source fidelity

How should the feature preserve source evidence, citations, intake warnings, and compliance boundaries?

## Out of scope

List anything this feature should explicitly not do.
